name: Ultimate Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1 1/4 cups extra sharp cheddar cheese, cubed
1 1 1/4 cups packed grated extra-sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a heavy, large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onion and sauté until slightly softened, about 4 minutes.
3. Add the chopped spinach and sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add corn and sauté until the vegetables are tender, approximately 4 minutes.
- This dish can be prepared up to one day in advance. Cover tightly and refrigerate.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (176°C).
6. Lightly butter a 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish.
7. Cook macaroni in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until al dente. Drain the pasta.
8. Transfer the cooked macaroni to the prepared dish and mix in the cubed cheese.
9. Whisk together flour, salt, mustard, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and nutmeg in a medium bowl until smooth.
10. Gradually whisk in half-and-half, then whipping cream and sour cream into the mixture.
11. Add eggs and Worcestershire sauce; whisk to combine.
12. Pour the sauce over the macaroni mixture and stir gently to blend.
13. Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese on top.
14. Bake the macaroni and cheese until just set around the edges, but still liquid in the center, for about 25 minutes.
15. Remove from oven and let stand for 10 minutes to thicken slightly (the sauce will be creamy).
